title: Bambino Folding Christmas Eve Box - 46x40x15cm
description: Keep your memories or gifts in this delightful large Christmas Eve box from BAMBINO BY JULIANA? as part of the Fairy Queen Christmas Collection. Finished in soothing, crisp white with silver foiled lettering and golden stars. From the very first breath there are so many milestones to remember. This range of keepsakes is designed for you to store every one of them for generations to come. Designed to stand the test of time, BAMBINO BY JULIANA? was created to provide a brand to be there from the very beginning. From baby showers and scans to first birthdays, BAMBINO BY JULIANA? has the perfect range for every occasion. Premium finishes including silver plating and crystal embellishments ensure we stay on trend. creating a contemporary and stylish finish. With attractive packaging, BAMBINO BY JULIANA? offers the perfect collection of truly thoughtful giftware for any special occasion with unbeatable value for money. Product Details Brand : Bambino Height (cm) : 15 Width (cm) : 46 Depth (cm) : 40 Weight (kg) : 0.85 Colour : White Type : Other Seasonal Decorations
